name: Scallops with Spicy Tomatoes and Fettuccine
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse scallops and set aside.
2. In a large sauté pan heat oil and add scallions, garlic, tomatoes, wine, vinegar, parsley, basil, salt, and pepper. Cook on medium-high until vigorously boiling.
3. Reduce heat to medium-low and cook for 15 minutes.
4. Cook pasta according to package directions. While the pasta is cooking, add scallops to the tomato mixture and cook for 5 to 7 minutes until the scallops are done.
5. Add drained pasta to the tomato sauce and toss. Sprinkle each serving with freshly grated Parmesan cheese and garnish with parsley.
